regions.modelScope: Dominion Energy Virginia service-territory data-centre billing demand. Framed as DC + Mid-Atlantic because Northern Virginia, which dominates Dominion’s data-centre load, is the cloud-infrastructure cluster most relevant to DC readers.

sources.title: Dominion Energy Virginia 2025 data-centre forecasting presentation
PJM Dominion data-centre large load request

regions.caveat: Not a measurement of data centres physically inside DC. Not total PJM or Northeast data-centre load.
